description: Perform a code-level analysis of the requested scope, document logic, routes, contracts, structures, and risks, and produce a report plus backlog.
request: Do full deep audit and fill DEEP_SCAN_REPORT and BUG_BACKLOG with findings and priorities.

phases.title: Refresh Atlas Context
phases.goal: Load the existing atlas docs, validate the scoped modules, and refresh stale context needed for a reliable scan.
required: Read the current atlas docs before diving into code.
Confirm the exact directories, routes, APIs, or modules covered by the request.
Refresh atlas docs when stale context blocks an accurate scan.

phases.title: Analyze Code Paths
phases.goal: Inspect the requested scope deeply and capture logic flows, route structures, contracts, state handling, and mismatch risks.
required: Trace important execution paths, data transformations, route definitions, and module boundaries in the scoped area.
Identify mismatches, bug risks, dead paths, duplicated logic, or weak assumptions.
Keep findings evidence-based with exact files and commands used to verify them.

phases.title: Write Findings and Backlog
phases.goal: Produce durable reports and backlog entries so future work can execute without rescanning the full codebase.
required: Update the deep scan report with findings grouped by module or concern.
Update the bug backlog with prioritized, actionable items and verification steps.
Capture the scope scanned, files examined, and remaining blind spots.

phases.title: Verify and Summarize
phases.goal: Check the scan quality and ensure the atlas reflects newly clarified relationships.
required: Sanity-check the report and backlog against the code reviewed.
Update atlas docs for any clarified structure or contract information.
Append a concise final summary of the scan and its evidence.
